form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr4) over 2185m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 40 m by Not So Sweet (2:37.90) in 3yo MAIDEN on April 6 at $91. Two runs back 9th (Sr5) over 2185m at this track, beaten 45 m by Livy Ann (2:40.20) in 3yo MAIDEN on March 23 at $71. Hard to have on those efforts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced leaving the back straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Has been racing well this preparation and showed plenty of improvement following March 27 run. Last start won by 4.5 m (Sr2) at Wagin (2:43.80) beating Koh I Noor Camel in 3yo 0-2 WINs on April 2 at $7.50. This race will be harder than that win. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Unable to secure clear running for the majority of the home straight.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 6th (Fr2) over 2180m at Wagin beaten 20 m by Pet Shop Adda (2:43.80) in 3yo 0-2 WINs on April 2 at $19. Before that 4th (Fr2) over 2100m at Bunbury beaten 35 m by In Rare Air (2:35.40) in 3yo NR up to 75 on March 28 at $126. This will fully test.

form.formComment: Last start solid effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 2100m after showing early speed at Bunbury, beaten 6 m by Skyhigh Adda (2:35.20) in 3yo+ 0-1 WIN FM on April 4 at $17. Two runs back won by 2.5 m as favourite (Fr4) at Northam (2:13.10) beating Pet Shop Adda in 3yo NR up to 50 on March 20 at $2.10. One of the better chances.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 7 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Im Stealthy at Gloucester Park over 2130m in a 3yo No NR on March 13 at $31. Then a handy effort when a close third after showing early speed, behind Wheelsofortune at Gloucester Park over 2130m in a 3yo 1-3 WINs on April 7 at $26. Sure to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait in the front straight to receive the bell.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he 11th (Fr3) over 2130m at Gloucester Park, beaten 35 m by Ideal Beach (2:35.00) in 2yo G1 No NR CG on September 5 at $126. Should be there at the business end.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. Previously first up posted a big 15 m win (Fr8) at Gloucester Park (2:33.20) beating Methuselah in 2yo MAIDEN CG on November 11 at $3.20. Sure to play a major role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from the paddock. Previously first up posted a big 15 m win (Fr8) at Gloucester Park (2:33.20) beating Methuselah in 2yo MAIDEN CG on November 11 at $3.20. Sure to play a major role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait approaching the back straight on the final occasion.
Broke in the score up however was in position at the start.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr1) over 2130m at Gloucester Park beaten 3.5 m by Wheelsofortune (2:33.90) in 3yo 1-3 WINs on April 7 at $31. Two runs back 7th (Sr1) over 2130m at Gloucester Park, at the bell was 8th-10.8m on the pegs beaten 18 m by D Mac (2:34.40) in 2yo G1 No NR on September 26 at $151. Watch for a spike in form.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third after being driven well back, behind Maternal Dreams at Gloucester Park over 2130m in a 3yo 1-3 WINs on March 24 at $1.70. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Wheelsofortune at Gloucester Park over 2130m in a 3yo 1-3 WINs on April 7 at $5.50. Leading player.
